rows.label: qev087104_MSG0001
rows.name:
I received your report. Good
work collecting those samples.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087104_MSG0002
rows.name: I'm just sorry we weren't able to get more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087104_MSG0003
rows.name:
We'll take what we can
get. You have my thanks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087104_MSG0005
rows.name:
If we can forge an alliance, I'm certain
they'll be friends we can trust.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087104_MSG0006
rows.name:
I'll remember that. And should the day
come, I'd like you to serve as ambassador.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087104_MSG0007
rows.name:
My pleasure. As long as you don't
send me there to declare war.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087104_MSG0009
rows.name:
The fewer enemies we have,
the easier my job is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087104_MSG0011
rows.name:
That was quite the sample
collection. Excellent work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087104_MSG0013
rows.name:
If we can forge an alliance, I'm certain
they'll be friends we can trust.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087104_MSG0015
rows.name:
And should that day come, would you
consider serving as ambassador?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087104_MSG0016
rows.name:
Of course. As long as you don't
send me there to declare war.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087104_MSG0018
rows.name:
The fewer enemies we have,
the easier my job is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087104_MSG0019
rows.name:
You have my thanks. Now go and
rest up until your next mission.[ST:wait ]
